cleavage agent: 8 mM DTT, and 2.5 μg/mL sequencing-grade modified trypsin
fragmentation method: using either CID with the linear ion trap or HCD combined with Orbitrap
instrument: mass spectrometric analysis of the samples was performed using an Orbitrap Velos Pro mass spectrometer
ionization type: using an electrospray potential of 2300 V
reduction reagent: 8 mM DTT, and 2.5 μg/mL sequencing-grade modified trypsin
reduction concentration: 8 mM DTT, and 2.5 μg/mL sequencing-grade modified trypsin
